data.title: Bowen Coking Coal Announces Director’s Interest Change
data.description:
Bowen Coking Coal Ltd ( (AU:BCB) ) has issued an update.

Bowen Coking Coal Limited announced a change in the director’s interest, specifically regarding the expiration of unlisted options held by Director Nick Jorss through various investment entities. This change reflects the company’s ongoing management of its securities and may influence shareholder perceptions and the director’s stake in the company.

More about Bowen Coking Coal Ltd

Bowen Coking Coal Limited operates in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and production of coking coal, a key component in steel manufacturing. The company is positioned to serve the global steel industry, leveraging its coal resources to meet market demands.

data.description:
Antipa Minerals Limited ( (AU:AZY) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Antipa Minerals Limited announced the quotation of 166,601 new fully paid ordinary securities on the ASX, reflecting the exercise of options or conversion of other convertible securities. data.title: I-NET Corp. Announces Board of Directors Changes
data.description:
I-Net Corporation ( (JP:9600) ) has provided an announcement.

I-NET Corp., a company listed on the Tokyo Prime Market, announced changes in its board of directors, with several appointments set to be confirmed at the upcoming shareholders’ meeting. Notably, Noriko Suzuki is set to transition from her role as an audit and supervisory board member to an outside director, while Toshihiko Matsuo is newly appointed as a full-time audit and supervisory committee member. These changes reflect the company’s ongoing efforts to strengthen its governance structure.

More about I-Net Corporation

data.title: Seven Bank Details Shareholder Relations and Strategic Integration with Seven-Eleven
data.description:
An update from Seven Bank, Ltd. ( (JP:8410) ) is now available.

Seven Bank, Ltd. announced details regarding its controlling shareholders, highlighting its relationship with its parent company, Seven & i Holdings Co., Ltd., which indirectly holds 46.44% of its voting rights. The bank’s operations are heavily integrated with Seven-Eleven Japan Co., Ltd., as 82% of its ATM network is located in these stores, underscoring the strategic importance of this relationship for its business model and market positioning.

More about Seven Bank, Ltd.

Seven Bank, Ltd. operates within the financial services industry, primarily offering ATM services. It is a key financial arm of the Seven & i Group, with a significant portion of its ATM network located in Seven-Eleven Japan Co., Ltd. stores.

data.title: PRONEXUS Announces 95th Anniversary Commemorative Dividend
data.description:
PRONEXUS Incorporated ( (JP:7893) ) has shared an update.

PRONEXUS INC. announced a commemorative dividend to celebrate the 95th anniversary of its predecessor, Asia Shokai. The company will issue a 2 yen per share dividend at the end of the second quarter of the fiscal year ending March 31, 2026, as a gesture of gratitude to its stakeholders. This decision reflects PRONEXUS’s commitment to rewarding its shareholders and marks a significant milestone in its corporate history.

More about PRONEXUS Incorporated

data.title: Shima Seiki Mfg. Continues Executive Compensation Reductions Amid Financial Review
data.description:
The latest update is out from Shima Seiki Mfg ( (JP:6222) ).

Shima Seiki Mfg., Ltd. has announced a continuation of its executive compensation reduction strategy, initially implemented in October 2024, as a response to their consolidated financial results for the fiscal year ending March 31, 2025. The decision, approved by the Board of Directors, includes reductions in monthly compensation for various executive roles and a voluntary return of compensation by directors serving as audit and supervisory committee members, highlighting the company’s commitment to clarifying management responsibility and addressing financial performance challenges.

More about Shima Seiki Mfg

Shima Seiki Mfg., Ltd. operates in the manufacturing industry, focusing on producing advanced knitting machinery and related products. The company is known for its innovative solutions in the textile industry, catering to a global market with a strong emphasis on technological advancement.

data.title: Pola Orbis Holdings Faces Profit Decline Despite Sales Growth in Q1 2025
data.description:
Pola Orbis Holdings ( (JP:4927) ) has shared an announcement.

Pola Orbis Holdings reported a slight increase in net sales for the first quarter of fiscal 2025, with a 1% year-on-year growth. However, the company experienced a significant decline in profit attributable to owners of the parent, dropping by 58.1% compared to the previous year. The financial results indicate challenges in maintaining profitability despite stable sales, which may impact the company’s market positioning and stakeholder confidence.

More about Pola Orbis Holdings

Pola Orbis Holdings Inc. operates in the cosmetics industry, focusing on the development and sale of beauty and skincare products. The company is listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange and is known for its innovative approach in the cosmetics market.

data.title: GREE Holdings Revises Dividend Forecast with Commemorative Addition
data.description:
An announcement from GREE ( (JP:3632) ) is now available.

GREE Holdings, Inc. announced a revision of its dividend forecast for the fiscal year ending June 30, 2025, with a total annual dividend expected to be 14.5 yen per share. This includes a 10 yen commemorative dividend celebrating the company’s 20th anniversary, in addition to the ordinary dividend of 4.5 yen per share. The decision reflects GREE’s commitment to providing returns to shareholders while maintaining business growth and stability.

More about GREE

GREE Holdings, Inc. operates within the technology industry, primarily focusing on mobile and social networking services. The company is known for its innovative digital entertainment products and has a significant presence in the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime Market.
